description_long: This is a single-propeller, fixed-wing airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic low-wing configuration. The body is primarily orange with blue and white accents, and the wings are marked with large black symbols and numbers. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all painted in matching colors. The landing gear is visible and consists of two main wheels and a smaller tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the overall design suggests a vintage or racing style aircraft.
description: A vintage-style, single-propeller airplane with orange, blue, and white coloring, low-mounted straight wings, and a taildragger landing gear. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned near the nose, with distinctive markings on the wings and fuselage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, nose, and symmetrical low-mounted wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit canopy, and tail markings, with the propeller and landing gear visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, and the full span of the wings with markings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit, and tail, with clear visibility of the landing gear and wing markings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral and no visible winglets or sweep.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
